name: mathmaster-html
description: Educational math game with Matrix-themed UI where players solve algebra equations by clicking falling symbols

scripts.verify:quick: npm run lint && echo '✅ Lint passed!'
scripts.test:competition:soak: cross-env MM_TEST_SEED=competition-soak npx playwright test --config=playwright.competition.config.js --project=qa-matrix-chromium --repeat-each=3 tests/gameplay-features.spec.js tests/powerups.spec.js
scripts.test:competition:stress: cross-env MM_TEST_SEED=competition-stress npx playwright test --config=playwright.competition.config.js --project=qa-matrix-chromium --project=qa-matrix-pixel-7 tests/e2e-full-game-stress.spec.js
scripts.test:competition:full: cross-env MM_TEST_SEED=competition-full npx playwright test --config=playwright.competition.config.js --project=qa-matrix-chromium --project=qa-matrix-firefox --project=qa-matrix-webkit --project=qa-matrix-iphone-13 --project=qa-matrix-pixel-7 tests/e2e-full-game-critical.spec.js tests/e2e-full-game-stress.spec.js
scripts.test:manual: echo 'Open http://localhost:8000/game.html?level=beginner and press P to view performance monitor'

author: TeacherEvan
